description: Response body for POST /v1/census/baselines/{name} — creates a named baseline from the most recent completed census snapshot. The baseline field is the newly registered CensusBaselineItem. Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (#366). Source: src/api/v1/schemas.py, class CensusBaselineCreateResponse.
